faqs.question: How do I get started with OpenAI integration?
faqs.answer: You'll need an OpenAI API key from platform.openai.com. Create an account, navigate to API keys, and generate a new key. Then connect it in Gapflow's integration settings.

faqs.question: What models are supported?
faqs.answer: Gapflow supports all OpenAI models including GPT-4, GPT-3.5 Turbo, DALL-E 3, Whisper, and TTS. You can select the appropriate model based on your use case and budget.

faqs.question: How is pricing handled?
faqs.answer: OpenAI charges based on token usage. Gapflow displays estimated costs before running workflows and provides detailed usage analytics to help you monitor and optimize spending.

faqs.question: Can I use custom fine-tuned models?
faqs.answer: Yes! If you've fine-tuned models in OpenAI, you can reference them by their model ID in your Gapflow workflows.

faqs.question: What about rate limits?
faqs.answer: OpenAI enforces rate limits based on your account tier. Gapflow automatically handles rate limiting with intelligent retry logic and queuing.

faqs.question: How do I ensure quality responses?
faqs.answer: Use clear, specific prompts with examples. Set appropriate temperature and max token parameters. Test thoroughly and implement validation checks in your workflows.

limits.title: Token Limits
limits.description: Each model has maximum token limits for input and output. GPT-4 supports up to 128K tokens, while GPT-3.5 Turbo supports up to 16K tokens. Plan your workflows accordingly.

limits.title: Rate Limits
limits.description: OpenAI enforces rate limits based on your usage tier. Gapflow handles these automatically, but high-volume workflows may need batching or queuing strategies.

limits.title: Cost Management
limits.description: Monitor your usage carefully as costs can add up quickly with high-volume operations. Use cheaper models where appropriate and implement caching strategies.

limits.title: Content Policy
limits.description: OpenAI has usage policies that prohibit certain types of content. Ensure your workflows comply with OpenAI's usage policies to avoid API restrictions.
